StringData.String: Add
Remove
{COIN} {%amt%}
In Guild
Guild Full
Purchase {COIN} {%amt%}
Edit
Submit
Throne Room {COIN} {%amt%}
Unlock {COIN} {%amt%}
Unlock {COIN} {%amt%}
Great Hall {COIN} {%amt%}
Upgrade {CROWN,1,-4} {%amt%}
Score the Guild Mate Bonus to reduce rest times. If you and your friend are in each others' guilds, rest times are decreased by 25%.
Score the Guild Mate Bonus to reduce rest times. If you and your friend are in each others' guilds, rest times are decreased by 25%.
If you want to recruit a friend not in your guild, you must replace a friend that is not resting.
If you want to add more friends to your Guild, you will need to buy a Throne Room first.
If you want to add more friends to your Guild, you need to unlock the Tavern in your Throne Room.
If you want to add more friends to your Guild, you need to unlock the Great Hall in your Throne Room.
Want to add more friends to your guild? Build a Great Hall in your castle to grow your guild by 4 slots.
Want to use your Guild Mates more frequently? Purchase my upgrade to decrease rest times by 10%.
If you want to call {%friend_hero_name%} to battle, you must remove a friend from your guild.
Your Guild is currently full. Let me show you how to manage your Guild now so you can use your closest friends in combat.
Welcome to your Guild. Friends who you use in combat are automatically added to your Guild if there is space.
You can only bring a Friend into battle if they are in your Guild. Add and remove friends using the buttons below.
Score the Guild Mate Bonus when you and your Friend are in each others' Guild and your rest time will be reduced by 25%.
Enjoy managing your Guild now, or close this interface to return to battle.
Click on friends on the friend bar to add them to your guild.
